known_ranges.label: legacy CSE combat-style row citations
known_ranges.reason: Row-level page numbers exist in legacy JSON, but rendered page/block evidence and independent verification are not yet committed for these CSE facts.

blockers: CSE source PDF is published/player-visible, but rendered page images and page/block evidence have not been generated.
Legacy row citations cannot be promoted until independent vision verification exists for contributing pages.
notes: U2 records the published CSE source identity and page count only. Legacy CSE page citations remain blocked metadata until page images, block evidence, extraction, and independent verification are committed.
